weaknesses: Limited explicit Generative AI application examples
No explicit corporate incident remediation tracking
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to track incident remediation and system performance, utilizing JIRA to document and resolve technical bottlenecks in enterprise applications.
Monitored device health and application performance metrics, leveraging Python and SQL to generate trend reports that improved user experience and system reliability.
Utilized Generative AI tools (ChatGPT/Claude) to automate data cleansing workflows and draft technical documentation for operational processes, increasing team efficiency by 25%.
Managed technical communication and release activities across departments using Outlook and PowerPoint to translate complex performance data into actionable insights for stakeholders.
Supported operational processes for software rollouts, coordinating with security and network teams to ensure consistent system availability and proactive issue prevention.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Engineering Associate - Application Performance & Analysis opportunity with Wells Fargo. I am interested in this opportunity because of Wells Fargo’s commitment to leveraging data-driven insights to improve the digital workplace experience for its employees. What interests me about working for Wells Fargo is its focus on enterprise-scale operational efficiency and its dedication to the CODE program’s mission of fostering early-career engineering talent. I believe my technical proficiency in SQL and Python and my experience in cross-functional data analysis would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex performance data into clear, actionable insights. In fact, at Shine Masters, I replaced manual reporting with automated Power BI dashboards that identified process bottlenecks and high-value segments, which led to a 300% increase in customer acquisition and significantly reduced data processing time. Ultimately, I know that the Engineering Associate - Application Performance & Analysis role at Wells Fargo would allow me to bring my data modeling and performance monitoring skills to improve enterprise application performance. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my incident tracking and cross-functional communication skills. I collaborated with Underwriting and Product teams to optimize relational database queries and resolve ticket-based bugs in JIRA, reducing project delivery delays by 25%. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and data analytics in working on proactive system monitoring and user experience optimization at Wells Fargo. I know that my analytical mindset and technical expertise align with what it takes to succeed at the Engineering Associate - Application Performance & Analysis role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
